props.ChoiceText: You began drilling other bowmen and learned that a veteran's worth is measured not only by his own shot, but by the steadiness of the line behind him.
props.ChoiceBio: Training other archers taught you that mastery in war includes discipline, repetition, and being answerable for weaker hands than your own.

0.TransitionText: Because training other archers taught you that mastery in war includes discipline, repetition, and being answerable for weaker hands than your own, bow, distance, and patience remained the shape of your life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because training other archers taught you that mastery in war includes discipline, repetition, and being answerable for weaker hands than your own, skill and steadiness pushed you toward command over other fighting men.
1.TransitionPrompt: You have begun to command attention as well as shots. Will you try to move from training bowmen to directing them?

2.TransitionText: Because training other archers taught you that mastery in war includes discipline, repetition, and being answerable for weaker hands than your own, you stayed among the bowmen as a hardened example to those behind you.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: Years spent demonstrating the bow left your shoulders, hands, and back marked by repetition as clearly as by age.
